title: anil tristis
intro: Anil tristis, also known as the neel or blue lotus, is a flowering plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Anil tristis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Anil tristis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety and insomnia.
